zh.Normanton, Metropolitan Borough of Wakef: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾諾曼東
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Rokeley於1401年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，她的父親Robert Rokeley26歲，母親Katherine Mirfeld31歲。她於大約1426年與Robert Drakes在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年之後。

zh-hans.Normanton, Metropolitan Borough of Wakef: 英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾諾曼東
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Rokeley于1401年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，她的父亲Robert Rokeley26岁，母亲Katherine Mirfeld31岁。她于大约1426年与Robert Drakes在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1436年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Rokeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Coakley  .

variants.name: Coakley
meanings: Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Caochlaoich, a patronymic from Caochlaoch, a personal name composed of the elements caoch ‘blind’ + laoch ‘warrior, hero’.
Irish: variant of Cloughley, possibly a shortened form of an unidentified Irish surname in Mac-.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Rokeley was born in 1401, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Rokeley, was 26 and her mother, Katherine Mirfeld, was 31. She married Robert Drakes about 1426, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1436.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Rokeley est née en 1401, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Rokeley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine Mirfeld, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Drakes environ 1426, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1436.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Rokeley(이)가 1401년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Rokeley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Mirfeld(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1426년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert Drakes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Rokeley родилась в 1401 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Rokeley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Mirfeld, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Drakes около 1426 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1436 г.
